batch_metadata.timezone_note: Entirely EDT (UTC-4). DST spring forward occurred Mar 9, 2025 — EDT is active for the remainder of Phase B through Nov 2, 2025 DST fall-back. RF-02 sms_secondary_section notes ROW-7806-7832; RF-01 starts at ROW-7805 (off-by-one pattern).
batch_metadata.note: Predominantly Eli-sent batch (INF-007 period — Eli holding communication boundaries). Almost all messages are Sent. Received messages limited to ROW-7807 ('Yeah'), ROW-7826-7829 (Melissa agreeing with 9-month parenting plan provision). Content: pickup coordination, Olivia visiting Eli's mom, birthday planning structure, parenting plan 9-month rule discussion (cooperative resolution). Zero RF-01 content.

ARC-RF01-001.notes: B-025 produces no RF-01 signals. May 22-29 period is entirely cooperative. Notable: Eli sets birthday planning structure for Olivia (ROW-7824 — activity, dinner, cake, movie); Eli and Melissa reach cooperative agreement on 9-month parenting plan rule for new partners (ROW-7825-7830). INF-007 period (Eli holding communication boundaries) = predominantly Sent messages; Melissa's Received messages this batch are cooperative.

batch_observations.tone_assessment: Cooperative throughout. Eli dominant sender (25 of 27 messages Sent). May 22: pickup logistics. May 25-26: Olivia visit with Eli's mom, food diary (Jimmy John's, brussel sprouts), birthday planning structure. May 28: Parenting plan 9-month rule for new significant others — Melissa engages cooperatively ('That's why I said something / I look at it the same as you'). May 29: Eli at an outdoor event (booted to cars).
batch_observations.parenting_plan_enforcement: ROW-7825 (May 28) is notable: Eli raises the parenting plan 9-month partner introduction provision in writing, citing Melissa's new partner and Olivia's relationship with him. Melissa's response (ROW-7826-7829) is cooperative — she agrees with the provision and clarifies the introduction happened prior to the relationship. This represents Eli setting a parenting-plan boundary (INF-007) and Melissa complying cooperatively. No escalation.
batch_observations.birthday_planning: ROW-7824 (May 26): Eli articulates a birthday planning structure for Olivia ('Pick one fun place/activity + Pick dinner place + Pick ur cake + Pick the movie'). This is cooperative parenting behavior — establishing a birthday tradition framework.
batch_observations.may_gap: May 4-21 appears to be a real gap in the messaging record (no messages). The prior batch (B-024) ended Apr 10; next message is May 22. This represents a 42-day gap in communication — consistent with the INF-007 period where Eli is holding communication boundaries.
